title: Fronteiras Cobblemon
body:
![11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2bc5a018f9357bcc9083a8f70c408fd8eb2681d.png)
[![Disc2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/918621e109b5b76c7b0ff0401cf25f6a7f93f453.png)](https://discord.com/invite/fronteirascobblemon)
[![Site2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11ba8282352c204feb7767cd838be599f7a851cb.png)](https://fronteirascobblemon.craftingstore.net/)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c90938fa5d84ca7605df68cfa522b2a15e1fa49d.png)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/453caafcf5e5373d259bd3919a46847ffbf3bf66.png)
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89765276d6c675a35d66daa1c9637ad43d73590c.webp)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Descrição em Português (PT-BR)
-----------------------------------
Modpack Oficial do Servidor Fronteiras Cobblemon!

Entre nessa aventura única onde Pokémon e Minecraft se encontram em um só lugar.

⚡ Capture Pokémon de todas as regiões

⚔️ Batalhe contra outros treinadores

🌎 Explore biomas incríveis

🎉 Participe de eventos exclusivos

🤝 Divirta-se com a nossa comunidade

Tudo isso otimizado para a melhor experiência multiplayer!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Description in English (EN-US)
---------------------------------------
Official Modpack of the Fronteiras Cobblemon Server!

Join this unique adventure where Pokémon and Minecraft come together in one place.

⚡ Capture Pokémon from every region

⚔️ Battle against other trainers

🌎 Explore amazing biomes

🎉 Take part in exclusive events

🤝 Have fun with our friendly community

Everything is optimized for the best multiplayer experience!
